title: chillium
description:
the best modpack for the chill in game.
best optimization
and just useful vanilla mods for a comfortable game.
body:
# the best modpack for the chill game
best optimization (my fps increased more than 8 times!!!)
![fps increase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c774b31064f8bb1bccccabb7fa191244399d376_0.webp)

and just useful vanilla mods for a comfortable game.

made by a player for **players**

# Installation
1. **Download** the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app).
2. **Install** the chillium via "Browse" in the app.
3. Play and just **chill**.

more info on the [Modrinth Modpack Guide](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth).




## just chill bro ❤
